siteStatus.title: Change site status

SUSPEND.description: The site will be suspended. Users will see a suspension screen at login.

BLOCK.description: The site will be blocked. All active sessions will be invalidated immediately.

RESTORE.description: The site will be restored to active state. Users will be able to log in normally.

ARCHIVE.description: The site will be irreversibly archived. This action cannot be undone.
ARCHIVE.confirmLabel: I confirm the permanent archiving of this site

siteStatus.raisonPlaceholder: Explain the reason for this action...
siteStatus.aucuneAction: No actions available for an archived site.
